name: build_all_pydatatables_dependencies
description: A script to build and install the npm packages used by PyDataTablesRenderers

scripts.build:pydatatables: cd pydatatables && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:pydatatables_anywidget: cd pydatatables_anywidget && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:pydatatables_for_dash: cd pydatatables_for_dash && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:pydatatables_for_streamlit: cd pydatatables_for_streamlit && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:pydatatables && npm run build:pydatatables_anywidget && npm run build:pydatatables_for_dash && npm run build:pydatatables_for_streamlit
scripts.build:pyaggrid_anywidget: cd pyaggrid_anywidget && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:pyaggrid_for_dash: cd pyaggrid_for_dash && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:pyaggrid_for_streamlit: cd pyaggrid_for_streamlit && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build-pyaggrid: npm run build:pyaggrid && npm run build:pyaggrid_anywidget && npm run build:pyaggrid_for_dash && npm run build:pyaggrid_for_streamlit

author: Marc Wouts
